name: MoneyGram
description_short: Fresno's MoneyGram at 4220 E Church Ave offers check cashing and money transfers—open daily 7AM to 11PM in CA.
description_long:
MoneyGram's Fresno location stands at 4220 E Church Ave as a full-service check-cashing center. Operating daily from 7AM to 11PM, this CA store is conveniently positioned in Fresno for residents seeking quick check cashing or money transfer services. The standalone storefront is easy to access during extended hours.

At this Fresno MoneyGram, you can cash checks, send money transfers, and access other payment services. Call +1 559-233-3579 to verify hours or ask about specific services available at this location in CA.

Fresno residents typically visit to cash paychecks, handle money transfers, or manage urgent financial needs. Bring your valid ID and the checks or documents you need processed. MoneyGram's straightforward service model works best for customers seeking quick, immediate financial transactions.
pros: 39 service locations across Fresno providing convenient geographic access
Extended hours at major retailers—Walmart open until 11:59 PM, CVS until 10 PM
Hybrid service model allows both online and in-person transactions
Partnership with established retailers (Walmart, CVS, Save Mart) for credibility and accessibility
Both domestic and international money transfer capabilities
Established global brand with long operational history
Multiple neighborhood locations including east, west, and central Fresno areas
cons: Higher transfer fees compared to digital-first money transfer services
Typically unfavorable exchange rates on international transfers versus competitors
Limited cost transparency on website—specific fees and rates not displayed
Reliance on agent locations may result in slower service than instant digital transfers
No mention of fraud protection or dispute resolution guarantees on website
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who prefer cash-based transactions
International money senders supporting family abroad without online banking setup
Customers needing same-day cash access who value physical location presence
Retail shoppers already visiting Walmart or CVS who need bill payment or money orders
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers who need accessible, in-person money transfer services and value convenience over competitive pricing. Primary caveat: transfer fees and exchange rates are typically higher than digital alternatives like Wise or Remitly; customers should compare costs before committing, especially for frequent international transfers.
services: Location finder by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Partner retail location services (Walmart, CVS, Save Mart)
meta_description: MoneyGram at 4220 E Church Ave, Fresno, CA. Check cashing and money transfers, daily 7AM–11PM.
